reviews.review_description:
Dead app?
never got it to i stall, tried 6 times, no Luck.
Bad UI. Loading takes forever for no reason. Unable to change zoom level. Zooming stopped working altogether.
The pictures showing up as smoke in the childrens toy was pretty cool.

I liked the app. I just wish it had a room where you could pin the pictures in a 360 world around you as well as resizing  showing off your vacation and what not. The room where the pictures are appearing and dissapearing when you stop looking at a pic is okay but I'd much rather have larger pics and the display stay longer or at least some customization.

Over all great app
I have all my pics on external sd and it can't see them I guess.

I love this, it makes photo viewing so much more interesting! Only complaint is the poor file recognition - a devoted image viewing app that can't read png or gif? Huh? Definitely needs an update since those formats are as basic and widespread as jpg (animated gif would be sweet too, but not necessary). Wish list for this app would includes limited ability to walk around in the galleries, like up and down the hall, around the museum and kids' room, etc. Juuuuust about perfect, keep up the good work!
Does not load pics, its a waste

In gearroom 360 photos only show as 2d photo 
I have a ecpensive vr head set so i want to see 360 photos.
And the app crashes a lot on mine galaysy s7 edhe phone and als it sud have the option to move it to SDcard to save inter
The app design looks really bad. And I couldn't find a single advantage over the stock Samsung Gallery app.
Ver vas App. Bit a good design
Despite all my photos on my phone and memory card this won't find them. Even with the detailed trying to go through every folder it finds nothing.

reviews.review_title: I think, it's just a beta(alpha?).
reviews.review_description: Funny tech demo but almost useless. It is cumbersome to use. However, it would be worth developing.
